g.text: ║ k8s4claw — AI Agent Runtime on Kubernetes ║
║ Demo: Deploy an agent on a real K8s cluster ║
Have a question, bug, or feature request? Let us know! https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/#community 🙂
▸ Step 2: Build and load OpenClaw runtime image
docker build -t k8s4claw-openclaw:dev -f runtimes/openclaw/Dockerfile runtimes/openclaw/ 2>&1 | ta
kind load docker-image k8s4claw-openclaw:dev --name k8s4claw-demo 2>&1 | tail -1

▸ Step 6: Chat with the agent via WebSocket
Hello! I'm an OpenClaw agent running on Kubernetes, managed by k8s4claw. How can I help your tea
k8s4claw manages AI agent runtimes on Kubernetes. It handles:
- Auto-updates with health checks and circuit breaker
